hero.desc: An educational edifice representing a qualitative leap for technical education in the country. Registered with the Ministry of Education to graduate skilled labor meeting the needs of developmental projects.
hero.location: Shabtout – Al-Golid Locality, Northern State, Sudan

about.subtitle: About the Initiative
about.title2: we build a generation of skilled labor.
about.desc: In the village of Shabtout, Al-Golid Locality in northern Sudan, stands Adeeb Al-Hajri Technical School — an educational edifice born of the Northern State Ministry of Education's vision for a model technical school serving the state and the country. The project was embraced by the generous benefactor Mr. Adeeb Ibrahim Al-Hajri of the sister State of Kuwait, who funded its construction entirely at his own expense, while the local community carried out the designs and procedures and construction firms built the project to the most modern standards. The school is officially registered with the Ministry of Education.
about.stats: Ninety academic schools in the Northern State, compared to only two technical schools.
about.basmala: In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

missingFacilities.title: Required Missing Facilities
missingFacilities.desc: We are seeking contributions to complete the following missing facilities:
list: Residential building for the principal and teachers
Wastewater treatment plant for the school to connect all facilities and reuse treated water for landscaping around the fence
Electrical transformer with a capacity of 500 KVA
Sports fields/courts: football, basketball, and volleyball

departments.title: Technical Departments
departments.description: High-level professional tracks, designed to meet the demands of the labor market with the highest engineering and technical quality standards.

programs.title: Academic Programs
programs.description: We offer eight highly specialized tracks representing the backbone of development and industry. Each track is carefully designed to graduate professional hands keeping pace with technology and meeting the needs of the labor market and local community.
programs.electricityDesc: Study and application of electrical circuit basics, residential and industrial wiring, and maintenance of generators and motors.
programs.autoMechanicsDesc: Diagnosing and repairing modern car faults, studying internal combustion engines, suspension, and braking systems.
programs.productionMechanicsDesc: Comprehensive training on turning, milling, metal forming, and CNC machine programming.
programs.hvacDesc: Installation and maintenance of residential and commercial air conditioning and refrigeration systems, and industrial cold rooms.
programs.architectureDesc: Basics of architectural design, quantity surveying, engineering drafting, and modern construction techniques.
programs.plumbingDesc: Water and sanitation network installations, modern irrigation techniques, and water treatment.
programs.computerDesc: Software and hardware maintenance, networks, introduction to programming, and web design.
programs.foodProcessingDesc: Preservation and packaging of agricultural products (dates, mangoes, vegetables), rural transformational industries to boost income.
programs.curriculumNote: The practical curriculum and credit hours schedule for this major are being prepared.
programs.communityServiceDesc: The Food Processing department is considered a direct social service to the people of the region, especially graduates. The department focuses on utilizing agricultural seasons to package and preserve dates, mangoes, potatoes, and tomatoes, aiming to ensure their availability during scarce seasons and provide a sustainable income source for productive families.

admissions.title: Admissions and Registration
admissions.description: Your gateway to a promising professional future. Fill out the initial registration form below, and the admissions team will contact you to complete the remaining procedures and documents.
admissions.locationDesc:
Northern State - Al-Golid Locality
Shabtout Village - Northern Artery Road, Km 419
admissions.successTitle: Your request has been sent successfully!
admissions.successDesc: Thank you. The management team will review your details and contact you shortly.
admissions.errorTitle: Sorry, an error occurred while sending.
admissions.errorDesc: Please check your internet connection and try again, or contact us directly by phone.

news.title: News and Events
news.description: Follow the latest updates, student achievements, and technical events at Adeeb Al-Hajri School.
news.article1Title: Contribution Campaign and Equipping Technical Workshops
news.article1P1: The total financial cost of the aforementioned constructions exceeds one million US dollars. We hope all serious parties, whether government entities, charitable organizations, or individuals, will actively contribute and fully adopt to overcome obstacles.
news.article1P2: We hope for joint efforts to furnish the school with movable assets and necessary equipment for the workshops in their various departments to realize the dream of generations.
news.article2P1: The school's headquarters is Shabtout village in the Northern State, about 90 kilometers south of Dongola, the state capital, and ten kilometers from Al-Golid city.
news.article2P2: This project serves a local community thirsty for vocational training and an educational revolution that will directly contribute to raising the standard of living and combating unemployment through the acquisition of technical and craft skills.
news.moreNewsDesc: Follow us soon to receive the latest updates on events, student achievements, and step-by-step construction developments.

progress.title: Work & Implementation Phases
progress.subtitle: Precise documentation and systematic progression to achieve the vision.
progress.phase1Desc: A building established on a ground floor and two upper floors with an area of 750 square meters. The ground and first floors have been completed, containing 6 lecture halls, 4 laboratories, and administrative offices.
progress.phase2Desc: Construction of 2 gable workshops, 40×15 meters each. Each workshop includes: a practical training hall, a theoretical study room, a teacher's office, and an equipment store.
progress.dormDesc: Two wings, 40×25m area. The ground floor of 3 stories has been built. Includes a VIP rest house.
progress.waterDesc: 550-foot artesian well equipped with a tank
progress.solarDesc: To operate the 11,000-gallon drinking water station
